notes: Clean V3 menu core remains the main menu renderer through clean-v3-menu-core-db.js.
Added clean-v3-menu-normalizer.js to normalize DB data after menu init.
Fixed duplicated main:home route by moving nav_main service node to nav:main.
Added cleanup for manual placeholder CHANNEL_ID / POST_ID records from ak_posts and ak_channels.
Short public /debug/menu-v3-live endpoint remains available for concise menu checks.
OpenApp comments launch remains unchanged and is kept as the correct baseline.
Comments module itself is not rewritten in this build.
